output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?venue ?firstMention WHERE {
  wd:Q123 p:P1256 ?goalStatement ; wdt:P1618 wd:Q11602 .
  ?goalStatement ps:P1256 ?match .
  ?match wdt:P119 ?venue ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?venue wdt:P2458 ?firstMention .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
